name: Atmospheric Generator High-Voltage Isolation and Energy Combiner Board

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Voltage Isolated Flyback Step-Down Switching Converters
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: Custom High-Ratio Solid-State Step Down, Input up to 100kV DC, Isolated Output set to 400V DC
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Bleeds and tethers the raw 75,000V DC atmospheric static charge coming from the AMHG-01 induction core down into the stable 400V DC grid rail

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Ultra-High Voltage Glass Passivated Bridge Rectifiers
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Flips the massive high-frequency 24.5 kHz acoustic hum and atmospheric percussive vibration waves from the 8 PVDF loops into clean DC current

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Synchronous High-Efficiency Step-Up Boost Converter Module
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: Custom 48V to 400V DC Boost, Continuous 2A capacity, Interlocking Gate Driver
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Steps up the high-current thermal energy collected by the 128 Seebeck pairs to meet the 400V common grid bus threshold

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Metal Oxide Varistors (Surge Protectors)
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: V20E420P (420V AC / 560V DC), Peak Surge Current 10,000A, Heavy Duty Radial Disc
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Passively clamps transient voltage spikes on the 400V grid bus if lightning strikes or atmospheric overpressure events bypass the induction gates
